changes: Incremental update from Apr 3 10:00 UTC baseline. Added: (1) Saudi 14-drone interception Apr 3 event + source (Arab News); (2) Bahrain cumulative intercept totals updated to 188 BMs + 445 drones since Feb 28 (Alwast News Apr 3); (3) UN Hormuz resolution STRIPPED of Chapter VII enforcement authority — loses binding legal force + military authorization (House of Saud, WaPo); (4) Israel Leviathan CONFIRMED PRODUCING per Bloomberg Apr 3 (was 'announced restart' before); Newmed Energy says domestic + export supply resuming; (5) Zarif settlement call + Pezeshkian letter to Americans added to Iran context; (6) Rystad total upstream disrupted figure (11,535 kboe/d) added to Saudi/Iran metrics; (7) Brent price updated to $109.03 settled (Apr 2, CNBC). No new FM declarations. No new shutdowns. All isNew flags current.
